creator: y7v81xhon@mozmail.com
text:
Well, this is fortunate, quite ironic considering I've been looking in the bugzillas for almost a week.
This bugzilla references my issue:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=239873

Solved it by running
sudo elfctl -e +noaslrstkgap /usr/local/bin/firefox
